Tab1Text1:
Welcome, Survivor.

You've landed in ZARK Gaming PvP - Currently in *Beta testing*, where the daytime is for building empires and the evening is for trying to burn someone else's down.

This server is built for fast progression and competitive PvP without the endless grind.

Server Highlights:

- 10x XP, Harvesting, Taming and Breeding
- Daily PvPvE Cycle
- Seasonal Map Rotation
- Element can appear in supply drops
- Quality-of-life mods for better building and automation
- Bases and Dinos will not decay

Spend the day building your base and raising dinos...Spend the night defending it.
Tab1Text2:
To keep the action flowing, this server runs 10x progression rates.

- XP: 10x
- Harvesting: 10x
- Taming: 10x
- Breeding: 10x

This means less grinding rocks for three hours and more time doing what Ark players truly love:

Building ridiculous bases, breeding terrifying war dinos, and arguing with their tribe about who left the gate open.
Tab2Text1:
Every day from 00:00 to 18:00 the server runs in PvE Mode.

During this time:

- Structures cannot be damaged
- Raiding is disabled
- Focus on farming, building and breeding
- Prepare your base for PvP hours

Think of it as preparation time before the nightly chaos begins.

Use it wisely.
Tab2Text2:
From 18:00 to 24:00 the island becomes a warzone.

During PvP time:

- Base raiding is allowed
- Structure damage is enabled
- Combat is unrestricted
- There are no gameplay rules

If you can destroy it, steal it, or blow it up - it's fair game.

Survival of the smartest tribe.
Tab3Text1:
To keep the cluster fresh and competitive, maps rotate during the year.

April > June
Fjordur

July > September
Ragnarok

September > December
Valguero

Each new map brings new strategies, new bases, and new wars.

When the map rotates, everyone starts fresh.
Tab3Text2:
Supply drops have been enhanced.

You may occasionally find Element inside supply crates along with other valuable loot.

Keep an eye on the sky - those glowing beams might change your entire war plan.
Tab4Text1:
This server runs a small set of quality-of-life mods to improve gameplay without breaking balance.

Structures Plus (S+)
Advanced building system with improved structures and utilities.

Automated Ark
Automation tools for crafting, resource management and base organization.

Reusable Plus
Reusable tools like grapples, parachutes and bolas.
Tab4Text2:
Join our Discord to stay updated with:

- Server announcements
- Map wipe schedules
- Events and PvP tournaments
- Support tickets

Discord link below
